title: Axe AI
body:
**Axe AI — The future of pixel art is here.**

Experience Minecraft like never before with this unique resource pack that upgrades the visual quality of all in-game axes, while strictly maintaining the classic 16x16 pixel fidelity you know and love.

🎨 **Key Features: AI Pixel-Art Refinement**
**Completely AI-Generated**: Every single axe texture—from the simple Wooden Axe to the mighty Netherite Axe—has been meticulously designed and refined using advanced Artificial Intelligence. Witness the cutting edge of creativity applied to classic gaming.

**Enhanced Vanilla Aesthetic**: This is not a total overhaul. Axe AI acts as a "Vanilla Polish," introducing richer shading, more defined edges, and deeper textures, making each tool feel more substantial and detailed without breaking the vanilla look.

**Axe Focus**: This pack focuses exclusively on elevating the appearance of your trusty wood-cutting tools, ensuring they look truly exceptional, no matter the material.

⛏️ **Perfect For**: Players who appreciate the classic Minecraft aesthetic but desire a sophisticated, high-quality visual upgrade for their essential tools.

Download **Axe AI** today and see the difference that intelligent design makes when you next chop down a tree!

![AXE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/973f13acab62376681c24328bef349e631ab7d87.png)
